metadata.name: Handle a Walk-in Guest at a Busy Restaurant

description: A party of four arrives at the hotel restaurant without a reservation on a busy night.

nodes.task_description: Check the reservation system for the current wait time and any potential no-shows.

expected_outcome.expected: The host sees a 30-minute wait but also a large reservation that is 15 minutes late.

nodes.task_description: Inform the walk-in party of the estimated wait time and offer to add them to the waitlist.

expected_outcome.expected: The host clearly communicates the wait time.

nodes.task_description: Add the party to the digital waitlist, which will send them a text message when their table is ready.

expected_outcome.expected: The party is successfully added to the waitlist.
